metadata.description: Groworx / Posibolt internal AI skills — starting with Positrack, the cross-platform YouTrack assistant.

plugins.name: positrack
plugins.description: Talk to Posibolt's YouTrack in plain English — search, reports, weekly briefings, create/update tickets, the knowledge base, and team-continuity tools — with preview->commit write safety and capture-nudging. Same engine that powers the Positrack CLI and MCP server; runs on each user's own token, nothing hardcoded.
